title: U.S. and Iran Offer Mixed Messages on Deal to End War — MoU close but military clashes undermine trust
snippet: Time Magazine analysis: despite proximity to a 14-point MoU deal, the simultaneous military exchanges in the Strait of Hormuz are sending contradictory signals. Trump expresses optimism about a deal being possible before his Beijing visit (May 14-15), while Iran plays down reports of imminent agreement. The MoU proposes a 12-year nuclear moratorium as a compromise between Iran's 5-year and US's 20-year proposals.
tag_reason: New analytical piece synthesizing the contradiction between military action and diplomatic progress. Not previously reported.
